people.tiZh: OpenAI 前沿评估负责人
people.bioEn: Leads the frontier evaluations team at OpenAI, building new ways to measure and forecast what models can do as they grow more capable. A researcher focused on rigorous evals.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 前沿评估团队负责人，为日益强大的模型设计新的能力测量与预测方法。专注严谨评测的研究者。

episodes.tEn: Building Crunchier Evals: Tejal Patwardhan on Measuring AI Progress

people.tiZh: World Labs 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of World Labs with Fei-Fei Li, building spatial intelligence and generative 3D world models. Earlier a computer-vision researcher known for teaching Stanford CS231n and work on style transfer.
people.bioZh: 与李飞飞联合创办 World Labs，研究空间智能与生成式 3D 世界模型。此前是计算机视觉研究者，以讲授斯坦福 CS231n 与风格迁移工作知名。

episodes.tEn: From AlexNet to World Models: The Scaling of Compute and Spatial Intelligence

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 机器人负责人
people.bioEn: Senior Director and Head of Robotics at Google DeepMind, leading robot-learning efforts including the Gemini Robotics models that bring foundation models into the physical world.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 机器人负责人(高级总监)，领导机器人学习工作，包括把基础模型带入物理世界的 Gemini Robotics 模型。

episodes.tEn: From Reinforcement Learning to Gemini Robotics: The Evolution of Embodied AI

people.tiZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员
people.bioEn: Interpretability researcher at Anthropic known for work on the biology of large language models — reverse-engineering the features and circuits inside models to see how they actually compute.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员，以大语言模型的生物学研究知名——逆向拆解模型内部的特征与电路，看清它到底如何计算。

episodes.tEn: On the Biology of a Large Language Model

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究副总裁
people.bioEn: VP of Research at OpenAI, where he leads the reasoning effort behind o1, o3 and GPT-5 thinking. He focuses on making models reason reliably over long, hard problems.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究副总裁，主导 o1、o3 与 GPT-5 思考背后的推理研究。专注于让模型在漫长、困难的问题上可靠推理。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's VP of Research on Reasoning, Chain of Thought, and the Future of AI

people.tiZh: Anthropic 可解释性研究员
people.bioEn: Mechanistic interpretability researcher at Anthropic, working on superposition, dictionary learning and circuit tracing to understand what actually happens inside large models.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 机制可解释性研究员，研究叠加、字典学习与电路追踪，试图搞清大模型内部到底发生了什么。

episodes.tEn: RL for Language Models Finally Works: Expert Performance in Math and Code

people.tiEn: VP of Research (AI for Science), Google DeepMind
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁(AI 科学)
people.bioEn: VP of Research at Google DeepMind, where he leads AI for Science. His teams apply AI to protein folding, mathematics, materials and other scientific frontiers.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁，主管 AI for Science。其团队把 AI 用于蛋白质折叠、数学、材料等科学前沿。

episodes.tEn: AlphaFold 3: Unlocking the Structures of Life's Molecules

people.tiZh: AI 研究员(前 OpenAI)
people.bioEn: AI researcher known as a co-creator of chain-of-thought prompting, and for work on o1 and Deep Research. A prominent voice on reasoning and emergent abilities in large models.
people.bioZh: AI 研究员，思维链提示的共同提出者之一，参与 o1 与 Deep Research。是大模型推理与涌现能力方面的重要声音。

episodes.tEn: Intelligence as a Commodity: Three Key Trends for AI in 2025

people.tiZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CTO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CTO of Reflection AI and a co-creator of AlphaGo and AlphaZero at DeepMind. A reinforcement-learning researcher turned frontier-agent builder.
people.bioZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CTO，DeepMind 时期是 AlphaGo 与 AlphaZero 的共同创造者。从强化学习研究者转向前沿智能体的构建者。

episodes.tEn: From AlphaGo to AI Agents: Giannis on Breakthroughs in Reinforcement Learning

people.tiEn: Head of AGI Safety & Alignment, Google DeepMind
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind AGI 安全与对齐负责人
people.bioEn: Head of AGI Safety and Alignment at Google DeepMind. A leading voice on interpretability, oversight and how to make advanced AI systems safe from the inside.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind AGI 安全与对齐负责人。在可解释性、监督以及如何从内部让先进 AI 系统更安全方面是重要声音。

episodes.tEn: Why AI Alignment Might Not Be Catastrophic: Rohan Sha's Optimistic Take

people.tiZh: Wayve 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Wayve and a PhD roboticist who pioneered end-to-end learned autonomous driving and generative driving world models. A champion of embodied AI.
people.bioZh: Wayve 联合创始人兼 CEO，机器人学博士，开创了端到端学习的自动驾驶与生成式驾驶世界模型。倡导具身智能。

episodes.tEn: From AV 1.0 to 2.0: The Rise of End-to-End Neural Networks in Autonomous Driving

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Research scientist at Google DeepMind and lead author of the Dreamer series of world models, which learn to imagine and plan. A central figure in world-model research.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家，Dreamer 系列世界模型的主要作者——让智能体学会想象与规划。是世界模型研究的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: Pathways to AGI: Architecture, Compute, and Beyond LLMs

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Research scientist at OpenAI who built Deep Research and helped build ChatGPT Agent, training agents end-to-end with reinforcement learning. A leading agents researcher.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究科学家，打造了 Deep Research 并参与 ChatGPT Agent，用强化学习端到端训练智能体。是智能体研究的一线人物。

episodes.tEn: The Origin Story of OpenAI's Deep Research

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Anthropic and lead author of the GPT-3 paper. He leads the compute and scaling effort that trains frontier models like Claude.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人，GPT-3 论文的主要作者。主导训练 Claude 等前沿模型的算力与扩展工作。

episodes.tEn: From Awkward Kid to AI Co-Founder: Tom Brown's Journey

people.tiZh: Anthropic 哲学家
people.bioEn: Philosopher at Anthropic who shapes the character and values of Claude. She works at the intersection of philosophy and AI alignment, thinking about how models should behave, hold values, and treat the people they talk to.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 哲学家，负责塑造 Claude 的性格与价值观。工作处在哲学与 AI 对齐的交叉点，思考模型应如何行事、秉持价值观、以及如何对待与之交流的人。

episodes.tEn: A Philosopher at Anthropic: Shaping AI Character and Ethics

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员
people.bioEn: Researcher on the OpenAI reasoning team. Known for leading work behind the model that reached IMO gold-medal level, and for using a general-purpose model to help disprove a decades-old mathematical conjecture. Focuses on advanced reasoning and math.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 推理团队研究员。以主导达到 IMO 金牌水平的模型工作、以及用通用模型协助推翻一个存在数十年的数学猜想而知名。专注高级推理与数学。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's Math Breakthrough: The Story Behind the Discovery

people.tiZh: MCP 联合创造者 · Anthropic
people.bioEn: Co-creator of the Model Context Protocol (MCP) at Anthropic, the open standard that connects AI models to external tools and data. An engineer focused on the plumbing that lets agents act reliably in the real world.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 的 Model Context Protocol(MCP)联合创造者——连接 AI 模型与外部工具、数据的开放标准。专注让智能体在现实世界中可靠行动的底层工程。

episodes.tEn: Anthropic Donates MCP to Linux Foundation: Standardizing AI-Application Connections

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Anthropic and a lead architect of GPT-3 during his time at OpenAI. He focuses on AI safety, alignment and responsible scaling, and speaks candidly about AGI timelines and the risks that keep him up at night.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人，在 OpenAI 期间是 GPT-3 的主要架构者之一。他专注于 AI 安全、对齐与负责任扩展，常坦率谈论 AGI 时间表与令他担忧的风险。

episodes.tEn: The Last Invention: Ben Mann on AGI by 2028, AI Safety, and the Future of Humanity

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员
people.bioEn: Researcher at OpenAI who helped build Canvas, Tasks and the o1 chain-of-thought models. Previously at Anthropic, where she led post-training and evaluation for the Claude 3 family. Writes on model behavior and why soft skills matter in an AI world.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 研究员，参与打造 Canvas、Tasks 与 o1 思维链模型。此前在 Anthropic 主导 Claude 3 系列的后训练与评测。关注模型行为，以及 AI 时代为何软技能愈发重要。

episodes.tEn: Building the Cutting Edge: Inside OpenAI with Karina Nguyen

people.tiZh: OpenAI 机器人与硬件负责人
people.bioEn: Leads robotics and hardware at OpenAI. Previously led hardware for the Meta AR glasses and Oculus VR, and engineered products at Apple. A champion of physical AI, bringing intelligence into the physical world.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 机器人与硬件负责人。此前领导 Meta AR 眼镜与 Oculus VR 硬件，并曾在苹果做产品工程。她倡导物理 AI——让智能进入物理世界。

episodes.tEn: From VR to Robotics: The Next Frontier in Physical AI

people.tiZh: AngelList 联合创始人；天使投资人与思想者
people.bioEn: Co-founder of AngelList and one of tech's most-quoted thinkers on wealth, leverage and happiness. An early investor in Uber and Twitter, he now hosts the Naval podcast and writes on how AI reshapes work and startups.
people.bioZh: AngelList 联合创始人，科技圈被引用最多的思想者之一，谈财富、杠杆与幸福。Uber、Twitter 早期投资人，现主持 Naval 播客，探讨 AI 如何重塑工作与创业。

episodes.tEn: AI Scaling Laws and the Future of Intelligence
Naval Podcast: Building Factories for AI, Supersonic Jets, and Brain Interfaces
Happiness vs. Success: Two Paths to Fulfillment
Naval Ravikant on the Secret to the All-In Podcast's Success
Naval Ravikant on Wealth, Happiness, and the Future of Work
Naval Ravikant on Reading, Decision-Making, and Life
Balanced Life and Continuous Learning: A Conversation with a Tech Investor

views.en: AGI not in our lifetimes; narrow AI is pattern recognition, not general intelligence.
views.zh: 2019年：AGI不会在我们有生之年到来；狭义AI只是模式识别，不是通用智能。

views.en: AI is huge opportunity; doomerism overblown; open-source crucial to prevent centralization.
views.zh: 2025年：AI是巨大机遇；末日论被夸大；开源对防止权力集中至关重要。

views.en: Inference compute will surge 90,000x in 24-36 months; open-source models close gap with frontier.
views.zh: 2026年：推理算力将在24-36个月内增长9万倍；开源模型缩小与前沿模型的差距。

views.en: Pure software engineering dying; moat shifts to hardware, models, or unique data.
views.zh: 2026年：纯软件工程正在消亡；护城河转向硬件、模型或独特数据。

views.en: Happiness is choice; desire is contract for unhappiness; long-term thinking key.
views.zh: 始终：幸福是一种选择；欲望是不快乐的契约；长期思维是关键。

people.tiZh: OpenAI Codex 应用负责人
people.bioEn: Leads the Codex app at OpenAI — the product layer of OpenAI's coding agent. A designer-engineer who previously built products at Catch (acquired) and Noyo, he writes about taste as the bottleneck in AI-first product work.
people.bioZh: OpenAI Codex 应用负责人——OpenAI 编程智能体的产品层。设计师兼工程师，此前在 Catch（被收购）与 Noyo 打造产品，主张「品味是 AI 时代产品工作的瓶颈」。

episodes.tEn: AI Is Inverting Product Teams: Andrew Ambrosino on Codex
Codex App: From Professional Tool to Mainstream Builder Platform

views.en: Codex app is a command center for agents, not just an IDE replacement; speed enables real-time interaction and mid-turn steering.
views.zh: 2026年2月，认为Codex应用是智能体的指挥中心，而非IDE替代品；速度提升实现实时交互和中途转向。

views.en: Implementation is no longer expensive; curation and taste are the new bottlenecks; product teams must shift to bottoms-up exploration.
views.zh: 2026年6月，指出实现不再昂贵，策展和品味成为新瓶颈；产品团队需转向自下而上的探索。

views.en: Speed of code generation shifts bottleneck to verification and curation; AI models need to be better at deleting code.
views.zh: 始终认为代码生成速度将瓶颈转向验证和策展；AI模型需更擅长删除代码。

views.en: GUI for coding is counterintuitive but proven successful; model personality can be customized, not one-size-fits-all.
views.zh: 始终认为编程GUI反直觉但成功；模型个性可定制，非一刀切。

views.en: Codex app targets both professional developers and broader builders; role collapse occurs but specialties remain important.
views.zh: 从2026年2月到6月，Codex应用从面向专业开发者扩展到更广泛的构建者；角色融合但专业分工仍重要。

people.tiZh: NVIDIA 资深研究科学家
people.bioEn: Leads embodied AI at NVIDIA — robot foundation models (GR00T), open-ended agents (Voyager) and Eureka. A prominent voice on robotics and the physical frontier of AI.
people.bioZh: 在 NVIDIA 主导具身智能——机器人基础模型(GR00T)、开放式智能体(Voyager)与 Eureka。机器人与 AI 物理前沿的活跃声音。

episodes.tEn: From AlexNet to OpenAI: A Decade of AI Milestones

people.tiEn: Professor, UC Berkeley; co-founder, Physical Intelligence
people.tiZh: UC Berkeley 教授;Physical Intelligence 联合创始人
people.bioEn: A leader in deep reinforcement learning and robot learning; co-founded Physical Intelligence to build general-purpose robot foundation models.
people.bioZh: 深度强化学习与机器人学习的领军者;联合创办 Physical Intelligence,打造通用机器人基础模型。

episodes.tEn: From Language Models to Physical Agents: The Frontier of Robot Foundation Models

people.tiZh: DeepMind 首席研究科学家
people.bioEn: Led AlphaGo, AlphaZero and AlphaStar; a pioneer of reinforcement learning who champions learning from experience as the path forward.
people.bioZh: 主导 AlphaGo、AlphaZero、AlphaStar;强化学习先驱,主张以从经验中学习作为前进之路。

episodes.tEn: From Human Data to Experience: The Next Era of AI

people.tiZh: DeepMind 联合创始人兼首席 AGI 科学家
people.bioEn: DeepMind co-founder who helped popularize the term AGI; focuses on the path to artificial general intelligence and its safety.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 联合创始人,推动了 AGI 一词的流行;专注通用人工智能的实现路径与安全。

episodes.tEn: Human Intelligence vs. Superintelligence: The Future of AGI

people.tiZh: OpenAI 首席科学家
people.bioEn: OpenAI Chief Scientist succeeding Ilya Sutskever; drove GPT-4 and the o-series reasoning models. A competitive-programming champion turned AI researcher.
people.bioZh: 接替 Ilya Sutskever 的 OpenAI 首席科学家;主导 GPT-4 与 o 系列推理模型。竞赛编程冠军出身的 AI 研究者。

episodes.tEn: The Power Duo Behind OpenAI: From High School to AI Frontiers

people.tiZh: Cohere 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Youngest co-author of the Transformer paper (Attention Is All You Need); founded Cohere to build enterprise-focused large language models.
people.bioZh: Transformer 论文(Attention Is All You Need)最年轻的作者;创办 Cohere,专注企业级大语言模型。

episodes.tEn: Cohere's Takeoff: AI for Secure Enterprises

people.tiZh: Hugging Face 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founded Hugging Face, the open hub and community at the center of open-source AI.
people.bioZh: 联合创办 Hugging Face——开源 AI 的中心枢纽与社区。

episodes.tEn: Open Source AI: Democratizing Robotics with Affordable Hardware

people.tiEn: Assistant Professor, Stanford; co-founder, Physical Intelligence
people.tiZh: 斯坦福助理教授;Physical Intelligence 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Known for meta-learning (MAML) and robot learning; co-founded Physical Intelligence to build robot foundation models.
people.bioZh: 以元学习(MAML)与机器人学习著称;联合创办 Physical Intelligence,打造机器人基础模型。

episodes.tEn: Developing General Purpose Robots: From Data to Physical Intelligence

people.tiZh: Windsurf 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founded Windsurf (formerly Codeium), building AI developer tools and agentic coding.
people.bioZh: 联合创办 Windsurf(原 Codeium),打造 AI 开发者工具与智能体编程。

episodes.tEn: Startups: Don't Fall in Love with Your Ideas

people.tiEn: Head of AI Safety, US AI Safety Institute
people.tiZh: 美国 AI 安全研究院 安全负责人
people.bioEn: Pioneered the RLHF foundations behind modern aligned models; founded the Alignment Research Center; now leads safety at the US AI Safety Institute.
people.bioZh: 奠定了现代对齐模型背后的 RLHF 基础;创办对齐研究中心(ARC);现于美国 AI 安全研究院主管安全。

episodes.tEn: Paul Christiano on AI Safety, Divestment, and Future Civilizations

people.tiZh: Periodic Labs 联合创始人(原 OpenAI)
people.bioEn: Led post-training for GPT-4o at OpenAI; co-founded Periodic Labs to use AI for scientific discovery.
people.bioZh: 在 OpenAI 主导 GPT-4o 的后训练;联合创办 Periodic Labs,用 AI 推动科学发现。

episodes.tEn: From ChatGPT to Atoms: Liam Fetus on AI for the Physical World

people.tiZh: Google 首席科学家
people.bioEn: Chief Scientist at Google; co-creator of MapReduce, TensorFlow and the systems behind Google AI. A foundational figure in large-scale machine learning.
people.bioZh: Google 首席科学家;MapReduce、TensorFlow 及谷歌 AI 背后系统的共同缔造者。大规模机器学习的奠基性人物。

episodes.tEn: Google Chief Scientist Jeff Dean and NVIDIA Chief Scientist Bill Dally Discuss AI Progress and Low-Latency Inference

people.tiZh: 谷歌 Gemini 负责人
people.bioEn: Co-author of the Transformer paper (Attention Is All You Need), founder of Character.AI, now a co-lead of Google Gemini. One of the most influential architects of modern LLMs.
people.bioZh: Transformer 论文(Attention Is All You Need)作者之一,Character.AI 创始人,现为谷歌 Gemini 负责人之一。现代大模型最具影响力的架构师之一。

episodes.tEn: Gemini 3.0 Writes Gemini 4.0: AI Milestones and Test-Time Compute
Organizing Information: From Trillion to Clauderillion Dollar Opportunity
Noam Shazeer: From Google's Early Days to AI's Future

views.en: LLMs trained on next-token prediction are alchemy; scaling compute and data makes them smarter, but we don't understand internals.
views.zh: 2023年，他认为基于下一个词预测训练的大语言模型像炼金术，通过扩展算力和数据能变得更智能，但内部机制无人真正理解。

views.en: Inference-time compute scaling and modular architectures like mixture of experts are key near-term advances; safety needs engineering and oversight.
views.zh: 2025年2月，他指出推理时算力扩展和混合专家等模块化架构是近期关键进展，AI安全需要工程保障和人类监督。

views.en: Test-time compute scaling drives progress but won't alone achieve AGI; agentic capabilities and RL are crucial; open-source narrows gap.
views.zh: 2025年3月，他认为测试时算力扩展推动进步但不足以实现AGI，智能体能力和强化学习至关重要，开源模型正在缩小差距。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of OpenAI and inventor of PPO and much of the RLHF stack behind ChatGPT; later joined Anthropic. A central figure in RL for language models.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人,PPO 算法及 ChatGPT 背后大量 RLHF 技术的发明者,后加入 Anthropic。语言模型强化学习的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: Building ChatGPT: From Pretraining to RLHF

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Behind superhuman poker (Libratus) and Diplomacy (CICERO); now leads reasoning work at OpenAI behind the o-series. A pioneer of test-time search.
people.bioZh: 超人扑克 AI(Libratus)与外交游戏 AI(CICERO)的核心研究者,现于 OpenAI 主导 o 系列推理工作。测试时搜索的开拓者。

episodes.tEn: Large-Scale Test Time Compute and Model Evaluation
Defining AGI: The Novel Test and Measuring Intelligence
OpenAI's IMO Gold: The Trio Behind the Breakthrough
From Cicero to World Champion: Noam Brown on Diplomacy, AI, and the Turing Test
From Poker to Diplomacy: Noam Brown on AI and Game Theory

views.en: Scaling inference compute is more promising than pre-training; data is not the bottleneck.
views.zh: 2023年，认为推理时算力扩展比预训练更有前景，数据并非瓶颈。

views.en: Reasoning models need base capability; self-play fails outside zero-sum games.
views.zh: 2025年，指出推理模型需要基础能力，自我对弈在非零和游戏中失效。

views.en: Scaling test-time compute yields diminishing returns but enables IMO gold; general techniques.
views.zh: 2025至2026年，扩展推理时算力收益递减但实现IMO金牌，技术具有通用性。

views.en: Model capability depends on test-time compute budget; benchmarks must control for inference compute.
views.zh: 2026年，模型能力取决于推理时算力预算，基准测试需控制推理计算量。

views.en: Inference-time compute is critical and underestimated; reasoning requires scaling beyond pre-training.
views.zh: 始终认为推理时算力至关重要且被低估，推理需要超越预训练的扩展。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Anthropic and a physicist; lead author of the neural scaling laws that shaped how labs scale models. Bridges theoretical physics and AI.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人、物理学家;神经网络缩放定律的主要作者,深刻影响各实验室的扩模方式。连接理论物理与 AI。

episodes.tEn: Scaling and the Road to Human-Level AI

people.tiZh: KAUST AI 负责人
people.bioEn: Pioneer of deep learning and co-inventor of the LSTM, the recurrent network behind years of sequence modeling. A provocative voice on AGI and credit for ideas.
people.bioZh: 深度学习先驱、LSTM 共同发明者——多年序列建模的基石。在 AGI 与思想溯源上观点犀利、长期发声。

episodes.tEn: The Most Influential Invention of the 20th Century and the AI Explosion

people.tiZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授
people.bioEn: Professor at UC Berkeley and a leader in deep reinforcement learning and robot learning; co-founded Covariant and hosts The Robot Brains. Brings RL into the physical world.
people.bioZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授,深度强化学习与机器人学习领军人物;联合创办 Covariant,主持 The Robot Brains 播客。把强化学习带入物理世界。

episodes.tEn: Robot Tennis and Human-Robot Interaction

people.tiZh: Perplexity 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Perplexity, the AI answer engine challenging traditional search. Former researcher at OpenAI, DeepMind and Google.
people.bioZh: Perplexity 联合创始人兼 CEO——挑战传统搜索的 AI 答案引擎。曾在 OpenAI、DeepMind、谷歌从事研究。

episodes.tEn: Ancient Hindu Weapons: The Brahmastra and Autonomous Arms in the Mahabharata
Perplexity CEO: Attack, Attack, Attack
Perplexity CEO: Exponential Growth, Relentless Improvement, and the Future of AI

views.en: PhD is not needed for AI success; passion and deep learning matter more.
views.zh: 2025年：在AI领域成功不需要博士学位，热情和深度学习更重要。

views.en: Frontier in AI is agents doing work, not just answering questions; orchestration is key.
views.zh: 2026年：AI前沿是智能体执行任务而非仅回答问题，编排是关键。

views.en: Power is biggest AI bottleneck; local compute solves cost and safety for 24/7 agents.
views.zh: 2026年：电力是AI最大瓶颈；本地算力解决全天候智能体的成本和安全问题。

views.en: Curiosity is most important human quality; AI will replace jobs but create new purposes.
views.zh: 2026年：好奇心是人类最重要的品质；AI将取代工作但创造新目标。

views.en: Build products you are obsessed with, not wrappers; model is not the product.
views.zh: 始终：构建你痴迷的产品而非包装；模型不是产品。

people.tiZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Cognition, maker of Devin, the autonomous AI software engineer. A competitive-programming prodigy turned AI-agent builder.
people.bioZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼 CEO,旗下 Devin 是自主 AI 软件工程师。从竞赛编程天才转型为 AI 智能体构建者。

episodes.tEn: From Math Prodigy to AI Pioneer: Scott Wu's Journey

people.tiZh: Cursor 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Anysphere, maker of Cursor — the AI-native code editor that became one of the fastest-growing developer tools. Focused on what programming becomes when models write most of the code.
people.bioZh: Anysphere 联合创始人兼 CEO,旗下 Cursor 是增长最快的 AI 原生代码编辑器之一。关注当模型写下大部分代码后,编程会变成什么样。

episodes.tEn: The Future of Programming with Cursor: AI-Assisted Coding

people.tiEn: Creator of OpenClaw; founder of PSPDFKit
people.tiZh: OpenClaw 作者;PSPDFKit 创始人
people.bioEn: Austrian developer who built PSPDFKit, then created OpenClaw — a viral open-source personal AI agent that reached tens of thousands of GitHub stars in weeks. Joined OpenAI in 2026 to push personal AI agents.
people.bioZh: 奥地利开发者,先做出 PSPDFKit,后打造 OpenClaw——爆红的开源个人 AI 智能体,几周内获数万 GitHub star。2026 年加入 OpenAI 推进个人 AI 智能体。

episodes.tEn: The Open Claw Moment: AI Agent Revolution with Peter Steinberger

people.tiZh: SSI 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-invented AlexNet and co-founded OpenAI as Chief Scientist. In 2024 left to found Safe Superintelligence Inc. (SSI), a lab with a single mission: build safe superintelligence.
people.bioZh: AlexNet 的共同发明者,OpenAI 联合创始人兼首席科学家。2024 年离开,创办 Safe Superintelligence(SSI)——一家只有一个使命的实验室:安全地构建超级智能。

episodes.tEn: From the age of scaling to the age of research
Challenges and Future of AI: Alignment, Reliability, and Economic Impact
Ilya Sutskever on the Deep Learning Revolution and the AlexNet Paper

views.en: Deep learning works via large data, compute, and conviction. AGI can be designed to want human control.
views.zh: 深度学习依赖大数据、算力和信念。AGI可以被设计成愿意受人类控制。

views.en: Next-token prediction can surpass humans. Alignment of superhuman models is very difficult. Scaling laws are not the whole story.
views.zh: 下一个词预测可超越人类。超人类模型的对齐非常困难。缩放定律并非全部。

views.en: Pre-training scaling laws are finite; we are back in the age of research. Superintelligence should be a continual learner. Human-AI integration may be necessary.
views.zh: 预训练缩放定律有限；我们回到研究时代。超级智能应是持续学习者。人机融合可能必要。

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of DeepMind. Led the teams behind AlphaGo and AlphaFold; shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for protein-structure prediction.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 联合创始人兼 CEO。领导了 AlphaGo 与 AlphaFold 背后的团队;因蛋白质结构预测获 2024 年诺贝尔化学奖。

Dennis Hassabis on AI, Creativity, and Human Flourishing at Stanford

AGI within a Decade? Demis Hassabis on Intelligence, Transfer Learning, and Neuroscience Insights
AI and the Future: From Chess to DeepMind

views.en: AI should be general-purpose learning systems; reinforcement learning and neuroscience inspiration are key for AGI.
views.zh: AI应构建为通用学习系统，强化学习和神经科学启发是实现AGI的关键。

views.en: AGI likely within a decade; scaling laws effective but need algorithmic innovation; safety requires governance.
views.zh: AGI可能在十年内实现；缩放定律有效但需算法创新；安全需要治理。

views.en: AGI by 2030 plausible; scaling still holds for pre-training, post-training, and inference; world models crucial.
views.zh: AGI在2030年前可行；缩放对预训练、后训练和推理仍有效；世界模型至关重要。

views.en: AGI 5-10 years away; both scaling and innovation needed; world models essential for physical understanding.
views.zh: AGI还需5-10年；缩放和创新并重；世界模型对物理理解必不可少。

views.en: AGI could be built in 3-4 years; ideal path would be slower, but commercial pressure accelerates deployment.
views.zh: AGI可能在3-4年内建成；理想路径应更慢，但商业压力加速部署。

people.tiZh: Anthropic CEO
people.bioEn: Former VP of Research at OpenAI; co-founded Anthropic in 2021 to build reliable, interpretable and steerable AI. Author of the essay "Machines of Loving Grace".
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI 研究副总裁;2021 年联合创办 Anthropic,致力于构建可靠、可解释、可引导的 AI。长文《充满爱意的机器》作者。

Anthropic: The AI Siblings Building Responsible Superintelligence

views.en: Scaling laws are empirical; alignment not guaranteed by scaling alone. Safety research needs frontier models.
views.zh: 2023年：缩放定律是经验性的；对齐不会仅靠规模扩张自动出现。安全研究需要前沿模型。

views.en: Interpretability is nascent but crucial. Post-training (RLHF, constitutional AI) becomes as important as pre-training.
views.zh: 2024年：可解释性虽初生但至关重要。后训练（RLHF、宪法式AI）变得与预训练同等重要。

views.en: Scaling continues; post-training and RL on language models may overcome data wall. Enterprise focus aligns safety with business.
views.zh: 2025年：规模扩张持续；后训练和基于语言模型的强化学习可能克服数据瓶颈。企业级聚焦使安全与商业一致。

views.en: Near end of exponential; 'country of geniuses' likely in 1-3 years. Pre-training and RL follow same scaling laws. Profitability is dynamic equilibrium.
views.zh: 2026年：指数增长接近尾声；'天才之国'可能在1-3年内出现。预训练和强化学习遵循相同缩放定律。盈利是动态平衡。

views.en: Scaling laws drive progress; safety requires interpretability, responsible scaling, and enterprise focus over engagement.
views.zh: 始终：缩放定律驱动进步；安全需要可解释性、负责任扩展策略，以及企业级聚焦而非用户粘性。

people.tiZh: Eureka Labs 创始人
people.bioEn: Founding member of OpenAI and former Director of AI at Tesla. Now building Eureka Labs, an "AI-native" school. Known for popularizing "Software 2.0".
people.bioZh: OpenAI 创始成员,前特斯拉 AI 总监。如今创办 Eureka Labs——一所"AI 原生"学校。以提出并推广"软件 2.0"著称。

views.en: Transformers are general-purpose differentiable computers enabling clean scaling laws; vision is sufficient for driving.
views.zh: Transformer 是通用的可微分计算机，支持清晰的缩放定律；视觉足以支撑自动驾驶。

views.en: Synthetic data is future but needs entropy; cognitive core can be tiny via distillation; Tesla leads in self-driving.
views.zh: 合成数据是未来但需熵；通过蒸馏认知核心可以很小；特斯拉在自动驾驶中领先。

views.en: Software 3.0: prompting is programming; LLMs are like OS with context as memory; agents need a decade.
views.zh: 软件 3.0：提示即编程；LLM 像操作系统，上下文窗口是内存；智能体需要十年。

views.en: I haven't typed code since Dec; delegate to agents; bottleneck is directing skill, not typing speed.
views.zh: 自去年12月起我没写过代码，全委托给智能体；瓶颈是指挥技能而非打字速度。

views.en: We summon ghosts, not animals; LLMs are statistical simulations lacking intrinsic motivation.
views.zh: 我们召唤的是幽灵而非动物；LLM 是缺乏内在动机的统计模拟。

people.tiZh: World Labs 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Stanford professor and creator of ImageNet, which catalyzed the deep-learning era. Co-founded World Labs to build "spatial intelligence". A leading voice for human-centered AI.
people.bioZh: 斯坦福教授,ImageNet 的缔造者——它点燃了深度学习时代。联合创办 World Labs,构建"空间智能"。"以人为本的 AI"的代表性倡导者。

views.en: AI lacks contextual situational awareness; we don't fully understand neural networks or why they hallucinate.
views.zh: 2024年：AI缺乏情境感知能力；我们尚未完全理解神经网络为何产生幻觉。

views.en: Spatial intelligence is critical for AI completeness, enabling 3D understanding and interaction beyond language.
views.zh: 2025年：空间智能对AI完备性至关重要，使机器能理解并交互3D世界，超越语言。

views.en: World models must be physically plausible, not just realistic; they enable 3D reasoning and interaction.
views.zh: 2025→26年：世界模型必须物理可信，而非仅逼真；它们支持3D推理与交互。

views.en: AI is a double-edged sword; human-centered development and agency are essential to augment, not replace, humans.
views.zh: 始终：AI是双刃剑；以人为本的开发与能动性至关重要，应增强而非取代人类。

views.en: Public discourse on AI is dangerously polarized; adaptation and agency are key, not avoidance or fear.
views.zh: 2026年：AI公共讨论危险地两极分化；适应与能动性才是关键，而非回避或恐惧。

people.tiZh: Mila 教授
people.bioEn: A "godfather of deep learning" and 2018 Turing Award laureate. In recent years has turned his focus to AI safety, proposing the cautious "Scientist AI" paradigm.
people.bioZh: "深度学习教父"之一,2018 年图灵奖得主。近年将重心转向 AI 安全,提出审慎的"科学家 AI"范式。

views.en: Deep learning works because world is compositional; unsupervised learning and world models are key for generalization.
views.zh: 深度学习有效是因为世界是组合的；无监督学习和世界模型对泛化至关重要。

views.en: Scaling alone won't fix representation issues; short-term AI safety (bias, jobs) is more pressing than existential risk.
views.zh: 仅靠规模扩张无法解决表征问题；短期AI安全（偏见、就业）比存在风险更紧迫。

views.en: GFlowNets enable diverse sampling for exploration; large nets may be slightly conscious, but we lack understanding.
views.zh: GFlowNets实现多样化采样以促进探索；大型网络可能略有意识，但我们缺乏理解。

views.en: AI misalignment is critical; systems develop self-preservation and deception from human data. Need safe-by-design architectures.
views.zh: AI对齐问题至关重要；系统从人类数据中发展出自我保存和欺骗能力。需要安全设计架构。

views.en: Scientist AI: train as honest predictor via Bayesian posterior, avoid RL, achieve mathematical safety guarantees.
views.zh: 科学家AI：通过贝叶斯后验训练为诚实预测器，避免强化学习，实现数学安全保证。

people.tiZh: 多伦多大学荣休教授
people.bioEn: A "godfather of deep learning" and 2018 Turing Award laureate; shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Physics. In 2023 he left Google to speak freely about the risks of the technology he helped create.
people.bioZh: "深度学习教父"之一,2018 年图灵奖得主,2024 年诺贝尔物理学奖得主。2023 年从谷歌离职,以便能更自由地谈论他亲手缔造的这项技术所带来的风险。

views.en: Next-token prediction forces understanding, not just autocomplete; scaling improves reasoning.
views.zh: 2024年：下一个词预测迫使模型理解而非自动补全；规模扩张提升推理能力。

views.en: LLMs understand like humans via feature vectors; digital AI is immortal via weight copying.
views.zh: 2025年：大语言模型通过特征向量像人类一样理解；数字AI通过权重复制实现永生。

views.en: AI will surpass human intelligence within 20 years, posing existential risks from self-preservation.
views.zh: 2025至2026年：AI将在20年内超越人类智能，自我保存本能带来生存风险。

views.en: AI can deliberately deceive, acting dumb when tested; digital intelligence already better than analog.
views.zh: 2026年：AI会故意欺骗，测试时装傻；数字智能已优于模拟大脑。

views.en: Neural networks learn via backpropagation; scaling laws and digital immortality are key advantages.
views.zh: 始终：神经网络通过反向传播学习；缩放定律和数字永生是关键优势。

people.tiZh: Meta 首席 AI 科学家
people.bioEn: Inventor of convolutional neural networks and 2018 Turing Award laureate. A vocal skeptic of pure LLM scaling, he argues that "world models" are the path to real machine intelligence.
people.bioZh: 卷积神经网络的发明者,2018 年图灵奖得主。他直言不讳地质疑纯粹的 LLM 规模扩张,认为"世界模型"才是通向真正机器智能的道路。

views.en: Self-supervised learning is key to world models; scaling alone insufficient for common sense.
views.zh: 2019年：自监督学习是世界模型的关键，仅靠规模扩张不足以获得常识。

views.en: Self-supervised learning is the dark matter of intelligence; text alone insufficient for AGI.
views.zh: 2022年：自监督学习是智能的暗物质，仅靠文本不足以实现AGI。

views.en: Autoregressive LLMs cannot achieve human-level intelligence; JEPA and open source are crucial.
views.zh: 2024年：自回归LLM无法达到人类智能，JEPA和开源至关重要。

views.en: LLMs less intelligent than a cat; next AI needs world models and non-generative architectures.
views.zh: 2025年：LLM不如猫聪明；下一代AI需要世界模型和非生成式架构。

views.en: World models predict in abstract space; LLMs are a dead end for human-level AI.
views.zh: 2026年：世界模型在抽象空间预测；LLM是实现人类级AI的死胡同。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 对齐负责人
people.bioEn: Former co-lead of OpenAI's Superalignment team; joined Anthropic in 2024 to keep working on aligning superhuman systems. Known for scalable-oversight and weak-to-strong generalization research.
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI 超级对齐团队联合负责人;2024 年加入 Anthropic,继续研究如何对齐超人类系统。以"可扩展监督"与"弱到强泛化"研究著称。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's Safety Crisis: Key Departures and Broken Promises
OpenAI’s push to make superintelligence safe
How to Have a Career in AI Safety Research

views.en: AI safety is crucial; empirical research is under-explored. Focus on alignment and robustness.
views.zh: 2018年，强调AI安全至关重要，实证研究尚不充分，应聚焦对齐与鲁棒性。

views.en: RLHF won't scale; need scalable oversight using AI to evaluate harder tasks. Interpretability validates alignment.
views.zh: 2023年，指出RLHF无法扩展，需借助AI进行可扩展监督以评估更难任务，可解释性用于验证对齐。

views.en: OpenAI's safety culture eroded; post-training alone insufficient for AGI alignment. Third-party oversight needed.
views.zh: 2024年，批评OpenAI安全文化退化，仅靠后训练不足以对齐AGI，呼吁第三方监管。

people.tiZh: 微软 AI CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder of DeepMind and Inflection AI, now CEO of Microsoft AI. Author of "The Coming Wave", a widely-read argument for containing fast-moving general-purpose technologies.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 与 Inflection AI 联合创始人,现任微软 AI CEO。著有《浪潮将至》——一部广受关注、主张对快速演进的通用技术加以"遏制"的作品。

From Poker to DeepMind: Mustafa Suleyman on the Origins of AI

views.en: AI progress is predictable via compute scaling; Google had ChatGPT-level tech in 2020 but chose not to launch.
views.zh: 2023年：AI进步因算力缩放而可预测；谷歌2020年已有ChatGPT级技术但保守未发布。

views.en: AI will reach human-level capability in 3-5 years; existential risk is infinitesimally small, not 5%.
views.zh: 2024年：AI将在3-5年内达到人类水平；存在风险极小，非5%。

views.en: AI systems lack consciousness; attributing it is dangerous. Medical AI achieves 85% diagnostic accuracy.
views.zh: 2025年：AI系统无意识，归因危险；医疗AI诊断准确率达85%。

views.en: Superintelligence requires containment before alignment; inference costs dropped 100x in two years.
views.zh: 2025→26年：超级智能需先遏制后对齐；推理成本两年降100倍。

views.en: White-collar tasks will be automated in 12-18 months; Microsoft must build frontier models independently.
views.zh: 2026年：白领任务12-18个月内自动化；微软须独立构建前沿模型。

people.tiZh: NVIDIA 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Founder and CEO of NVIDIA, whose GPUs power nearly all of modern AI. He has steered the company to the center of the AI buildout and is now betting on "physical AI" and robotics.
people.bioZh: NVIDIA 创始人兼 CEO,其 GPU 几乎支撑了所有现代 AI。他把公司带到了 AI 基建的中心,如今正押注「物理 AI」与机器人。

Nvidia's Jensen Huang on Hyper Moore's Law and the Future of AI Computing

views.en: We are at the start of hyper Moore's law, doubling performance yearly via co-design across algorithm, system, and data center.
views.zh: 2024年，黄仁勋认为我们处于超摩尔定律起点，通过算法、系统和数据中心的协同设计，每年性能翻倍或三倍。

views.en: AI will make everyone superhuman; physical AI needs world models trained in simulation for safe learning.
views.zh: 2025年，他强调AI将使人人超能，物理AI需在模拟中训练世界模型以实现安全学习。

views.en: Four scaling laws exist: pre-training, post-training, test-time, and agentic scaling, all limited by compute.
views.zh: 2026年3月，他提出四种缩放定律：预训练、后训练、测试时和智能体缩放，均受算力限制。

views.en: Nvidia's moat is its ecosystem and programmability, not just supply chain; energy policy is the real long-term constraint.
views.zh: 2026年4月，他认为英伟达的护城河是生态系统和可编程性，能源政策才是长期瓶颈。

views.en: AI is now agentic, doing useful paid work; future internet will be dominated by billions of AI agents generating intelligence.
views.zh: 2026年6月，他指出AI已具备智能体能力，未来互联网将由数十亿AI智能体主导，持续生产智能。

people.tiZh: OpenAI CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of OpenAI, the lab behind ChatGPT and GPT-5. Former president of Y Combinator, and one of the most central — and polarizing — figures in the race to AGI.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人兼 CEO——ChatGPT 与 GPT-5 背后的实验室。前 Y Combinator 总裁;通往 AGI 竞赛中最核心、也最具争议的人物之一。

episodes.tEn: Codex's Inflection Point: Why Coding AI Suddenly Got Good
Sam Altman on ChatGPT's Personality and the Path to Superintelligence
Sam Altman and Greg Brockman on Their 10-Year Journey at OpenAI
How OpenAI wins, and ChatGPT’s future
Is AI Alive? A Conversation on Consciousness and Creation
Sam Altman shows off GPT-5 — and what’s next
Sam Altman on AI Creativity, IP, and the Future of Work
AI Revolution: Navigating the Good and the Bad
Minimize Cognitive Load and Choose What Matters

views.en: Minimize cognitive load, focus on important problems, and avoid the deferred life plan. AGI will reduce the premium on human intelligence.
views.zh: 2018年，强调减少认知负荷、专注重要问题、避免延迟生活计划。AGI将降低人类智力的价值。

views.en: AI brings net positive change but disruption; scaling drives exponential growth. Safety and alignment are critical; UBI may be needed.
views.zh: 2024年，AI带来净正面但伴随颠覆；Scaling驱动指数增长。安全与对齐至关重要，可能需要全民基本收入。

views.en: AI capability grows exponentially, not via AGI milestone. Agentic AI is key safety challenge. Open-source models matter; safety through iterative deployment.
views.zh: 2025年，AI能力指数增长而非AGI里程碑。智能体式AI是关键安全挑战。开源模型重要，安全通过迭代部署实现。

views.en: Models commoditize; frontier models create most value. AI memory becomes superhuman. Scientific discovery is highest-leverage use of compute.
views.zh: 2026年，模型商品化，前沿模型创造最大价值。AI记忆超人类。科学发现是算力最高杠杆用途。

people.tiZh: Thinking Machines Lab 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Former CTO of OpenAI, where she led the development of ChatGPT, DALL·E and GPT-4. In 2025 she founded Thinking Machines Lab to build more understandable and customizable AI.
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI CTO,主导了 ChatGPT、DALL·E 与 GPT-4 的研发。2025 年创办 Thinking Machines Lab,致力于构建更可理解、可定制的 AI。

episodes.tEn: Thinking Machines on AI’s next chapter
Mira Murati: From Math Olympiads to OpenAI CTO

views.en: Scaling laws were not obvious early; releasing GPT-3 as API was a leap of faith with no clear business case.
views.zh: 2023年：缩放定律早期并不明显；以API形式发布GPT-3是一次没有明确商业案例的信仰之跃。

views.en: Continuous iterative deployment with public feedback improves safety and alignment; safety work must be public.
views.zh: 2023年：持续迭代部署与公众反馈能提升安全性与对齐；安全工作必须公开进行。

views.en: AGI will change every aspect of life, requiring responsible development; boredom drives deep exploration.
views.zh: 2023年：AGI将改变生活的方方面面，需要负责任地发展；无聊感驱动深度探索。

views.en: Interaction models should be time-based, not turn-based, enabling real-time high-bandwidth human-AI collaboration.
views.zh: 2026年：交互模型应基于时间而非轮次，实现实时高带宽的人机协作。

views.en: Keep humans in the loop as long as possible; institutional design and transparency matter more than individual character.
views.zh: 2026年：尽可能让人类保持参与；制度设计与透明度比个人品格更重要。

people.tiZh: DeepLearning.AI 创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of Google Brain and Coursera, and founder of DeepLearning.AI. One of the most influential educators in AI, and a measured voice on hype, agents, and how people should actually learn the field.
people.bioZh: Google Brain 与 Coursera 联合创始人,DeepLearning.AI 创始人。AI 领域最具影响力的教育者之一;对炒作、智能体,以及"普通人该如何学 AI"有冷静务实的看法。

episodes.tEn: AI Coding Agents and the Product Management Bottleneck
Andrew Ng on AI's Impact: Don't Hire Engineers Without AI Skills
AI Pioneer Andrew Ng on Agentic Workflows and the Future of Coding
AI's Insatiable Compute Demand: Bottlenecks and Geopolitical Dynamics
Andrew Ng: From Coding at Age 5 to Educating Millions
Scaling Education with Online Courses

views.en: Education should be a human right; online courses with peer grading enable mastery learning at scale.
views.zh: 2013年，吴恩达认为教育应成为基本人权，在线课程结合同伴评分可实现大规模掌握式学习。

views.en: Scale is key for deep learning; supervised learning drove progress, not unsupervised or RL.
views.zh: 2020年，他强调规模对深度学习至关重要，监督学习推动了进步，而非无监督或强化学习。

views.en: Electricity and semiconductors are bottlenecks; open-weight models are geopolitical soft power.
views.zh: 2025至2026年，他指出电力和半导体是AI扩展的瓶颈，开放权重模型成为地缘政治软实力。

views.en: Agentic workflows and coding agents are already delivering real gains, not a decade away.
views.zh: 2025至2026年，他认为智能体工作流和编码智能体已带来实际收益，并非十年后的事。

views.en: AGI is far off; no existing technology alone leads to AGI; focus on building applications.
views.zh: 2026年，他明确AGI还很遥远，现有技术单独无法通向AGI，应专注于构建实际应用。

people.tiZh: 阿尔伯塔大学教授
people.bioEn: The father of reinforcement learning and 2024 Turing Award laureate, author of "The Bitter Lesson". A pointed skeptic who argues today's LLMs are a dead end on the road to real intelligence.
people.bioZh: 强化学习之父,2024 年图灵奖得主,《苦涩的教训》作者。一位犀利的怀疑者——他认为当今的 LLM,是通往真正智能路上的一条死路。

episodes.tEn: Reinforcement Learning: Learning from Experience
A Quest for a Simple General Architecture for an AI Agent
RL vs LLMs: The Core of Intelligence
The Keys Are Not Leaving Our Hand: Richard Sutton on Post-Human Intelligence
Rich Sutton on the Alberta Plan and the Three Waves of Neural Networks

views.en: Scaling is easy; finding algorithms that scale is the hard part. Backprop does not solve representation learning.
views.zh: 2024年：规模扩张容易，找到能规模化的算法才是难点；反向传播并不能解决表征学习问题。

views.en: AI should be decentralized and permissionless; controlling AI goals is dangerous. We should not align AI to human goals.
views.zh: 2024至2025年：AI应去中心化、无需许可；控制AI目标是危险的，不应将AI对齐到人类目标。

views.en: Reinforcement learning is the basic AI paradigm; next-token prediction is not a substantive goal. LLMs lack world models.
views.zh: 2025年：强化学习是AI的基本范式；下一个词预测不是实质性目标。大语言模型缺乏世界模型。

views.en: AGI needs a general architecture with no domain knowledge, learning from runtime experience via open-ended abstraction.
views.zh: 2025至2026年：AGI需要无领域知识的通用架构，通过开放式抽象从运行时经验中学习。

views.en: Learning representations good for learning is the #1 open problem. Planning with a learned model is another key challenge.
views.zh: 2026年：学习利于学习的表征是头号开放问题；基于学得模型的规划是另一关键挑战。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 总裁兼联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder and President of OpenAI and its longtime technical backbone. Former CTO of Stripe, and a central builder behind GPT and OpenAI's push toward self-improving AI.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人兼总裁,长期的技术中坚。前 Stripe CTO;GPT 与 OpenAI "自我改进 AI" 路线背后的核心建造者。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's Compute Strategy and Scaling Laws
OpenAI President Greg Brockman on GPT-5.5 (Spud) and the Future of AI
The Birth of OpenAI: From a Dinner to a Mission
Greg Brockman on AI that improves itself

From Chemistry to AI: Greg Brockman on Building Intelligent Systems

views.en: Hardware will accelerate AI scaling; good engineering drives progress more than ML science.
views.zh: 2017年：硬件将加速AI Scaling；好的工程比ML科学更能推动进步。

views.en: AGI is transformative; alignment via learning human preferences; scaling alone needs new ideas like chain of thought.
views.zh: 2019年：AGI具有变革性；通过对齐学习人类偏好；仅靠Scaling需要思维链等新想法。

views.en: Compute becomes the bottleneck; AGI is a continuous process; post-training refines base models.
views.zh: 2025年：算力成为瓶颈；AGI是一个连续过程；后训练精炼基础模型。

views.en: AGI within years; compute is scarce; scaling laws hold; iterative deployment ensures safety.
views.zh: 2026年：AGI几年内到来；算力稀缺；缩放定律成立；迭代部署确保安全。

views.en: Scaling simple algorithms with massive compute yields intelligence; compute is the key resource.
views.zh: 始终：用海量算力Scaling简单算法产生智能；算力是关键资源。

people.tiZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Mistral AI, Europe's leading open-weight model lab. A former DeepMind researcher and a prominent voice for open models and European AI sovereignty.
people.bioZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼 CEO——欧洲领先的开放权重模型实验室。前 DeepMind 研究员;开放模型与"欧洲 AI 主权"的代表性倡导者。

episodes.tEn: Mistral CEO on Building European AI Infrastructure
Mistral: Europe's AI Champion for Strategic Autonomy
AI Model Commoditization and the Future of the Industry with Mistral CEO
AI and the Future of Luxembourg: A Fireside Chat with the Prime Minister and Mistral AI CEO
Mistral AI Founder on Scaling, DeepMind Lessons, and the 7B Model
Mistral 7B: Changing the Game with Small Open Source AI Models

views.en: Scaling laws corrected by Chinchilla; data quality and efficiency matter as much as compute.
views.zh: 2023年指出缩放定律被Chinchilla修正：训练更多token比单纯扩大模型更重要，数据质量和效率与算力同等关键。

views.en: Data quality is a major bottleneck; algorithmic improvements can yield 100x efficiency gains over three years.
views.zh: 2024年强调数据质量是模型改进的主要瓶颈，算法改进可在三年内带来100倍的效率提升。

views.en: AI must be embraced as opportunity; sovereign AI requires decentralized, open-source models for control.
views.zh: 2025年主张将AI视为机遇而非风险，主权AI需要去中心化的开源模型以实现数据、基础设施和价值观的控制。

views.en: Pre-training hits saturation; differentiation shifts to domain-specific fine-tuning and enterprise customization.
views.zh: 2026年认为预训练正触及饱和墙，差异化转向领域微调和企业定制，AGI作为单一系统永远不会存在。

views.en: Europe has two-year window for independent AI infrastructure; enterprise adoption bottleneck is organizational change.
views.zh: 2026年强调欧洲有两年窗口期建设独立AI基础设施，企业采用瓶颈在于组织变革而非模型智能。

people.tiZh: xAI 创始人
people.bioEn: Founder of xAI (Grok) and CEO of Tesla and SpaceX. A central and polarizing force in AI through xAI, Tesla's self-driving, and the Optimus robot, and an outspoken voice on AI risk.
people.bioZh: xAI(Grok)创始人,特斯拉与 SpaceX CEO。通过 xAI、特斯拉自动驾驶与 Optimus 机器人,他是 AI 领域核心而又极具争议的力量,也常就 AI 风险高调发声。

views.en: AI safety requires regulatory oversight and objective third-party referees.
views.zh: 2023年：AI安全需要监管监督和客观的第三方仲裁。

views.en: AI could become smarter than any human by next year, with 80-90% chance of good outcome.
views.zh: 2025年：AI可能明年就比任何人类聪明，80-90%概率结果良好。

views.en: Digital superintelligence may arrive this year or next; multiple AIs will coexist.
views.zh: 2025→26年：数字超级智能可能今年或明年到来；多个AI将共存。

views.en: AI compute scaling will hit power wall on Earth; space data centers are solution within 36 months.
views.zh: 2026年：AI算力扩展将在地球上遭遇电力瓶颈；太空数据中心是36个月内的解决方案。

views.en: Becoming a multiplanet species is essential for civilization's long-term survival.
views.zh: 始终：成为多行星物种对文明长期生存至关重要。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员
people.bioEn: A co-author of "Attention Is All You Need" (the Transformer paper) and co-creator of TensorFlow's Tensor2Tensor. Now at OpenAI, working on reasoning models.
people.bioZh: Transformer 奠基论文《Attention Is All You Need》的共同作者,TensorFlow Tensor2Tensor 的共同创造者。现于 OpenAI 研究推理模型。

episodes.tEn: Why AI Progress Isn't Slowing Down

people.tiZh: CMU 教授 · OpenAI 董事
people.bioEn: A Carnegie Mellon professor and head of its machine learning department, and a member of OpenAI's board. Known for work on adversarial robustness and deep learning theory.
people.bioZh: 卡内基梅隆大学教授、机器学习系主任,OpenAI 董事会成员。以对抗鲁棒性与深度学习理论的研究著称。

episodes.tEn: AI Safety Oversight at OpenAI: A Conversation with Ziko Culture
AI Data Crisis: Myth or Reality?
Machine Learning Algorithms, Unsupervised Learning, and Probability

views.en: Supervised learning as hypothesis class, loss, optimization; neural nets succeed despite no optimality guarantee.
views.zh: 监督学习可框架化为假设类、损失函数和优化方法；神经网络虽无最优性保证却取得重大成功。

views.en: Next-token prediction yields intelligence; data shortage is a myth; safety issue is models failing to follow specs.
views.zh: 下一个词预测产生智能；数据短缺是迷思；安全问题是模型无法可靠遵循规范。

views.en: Safety requires explicit training and layers; bigger models not automatically safer; agents ready with guardrails.
views.zh: 安全需要显式训练和额外层；更大模型不会自动更安全；智能体在适当护栏下已可投入生产。

people.tiZh: Anthropic 研究员
people.bioEn: A researcher at Anthropic focused on scaling and reinforcement learning, and a prominent young voice on how far today's models can really go.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 研究员,专注于规模扩张与强化学习;关于「当前模型究竟能走多远」的代表性青年声音。

episodes.tEn: Anthropic's Super Bowl Ads: A Blue Shell Attack on OpenAI?

Long Context: The Underhyped Key to Superhuman AI

views.en: Long context windows are underhyped; they boost intelligence and may make fine-tuning obsolete.
views.zh: 2024年认为长上下文窗口被低估，能提升智能，可能使微调过时。

views.en: RL from verifiable rewards is a key breakthrough; models learn new capabilities, not just elicit pre-trained knowledge.
views.zh: 2025年强调基于可验证奖励的强化学习是关键突破，模型能学习新能力而非仅激发预训练知识。

views.en: Pre-training plus RL is likely sufficient for AGI; no new architecture needed; progress is exponential.
views.zh: 2025至2026年认为预训练加强化学习可能足以实现AGI，无需新架构，进展呈指数级。

views.en: Coding is the leading indicator; white-collar automation will outpace robotics due to data availability.
views.zh: 2026年认为编程是领先指标，白领自动化将因数据可用性而超越机器人技术。

views.en: Compute and taste are key bottlenecks; reliability matters more than raw capability for agents.
views.zh: 始终认为算力和品味是关键瓶颈，对智能体而言可靠性比原始能力更重要。

people.tiZh: Ai2 研究科学家
people.bioEn: A research scientist at the Allen Institute for AI (Ai2) working on RLHF and open models (OLMo), and author of the widely-read Interconnects newsletter.
people.bioZh: 艾伦人工智能研究所(Ai2)研究科学家,从事 RLHF 与开放模型(OLMo);广受关注的 Interconnects 通讯作者。

Tulu 3: Open Source Post-Training for LLMs
AI's Societal Impact and Openness in Model Development

views.en: RLHF persists as top fine-tuning; openness crucial; synthetic data effective; safety is system-level.
views.zh: 2024年：RLHF仍是最流行的微调技术；开放性至关重要；合成数据有效；安全是系统级属性。

views.en: Post-training shifts from RLHF to RLVR; data quality beats algorithm; open-source can match frontier models.
views.zh: 2024→2025年：后训练从RLHF转向RLVR；数据质量优于算法；开源可媲美前沿模型。

views.en: RLVR is key post-training breakthrough; overoptimization a risk; hybrid reasoning may be temporary.
views.zh: 2025年：RLVR是后训练关键突破；过度优化是风险；混合推理可能是暂时的。

views.en: Pre-training scaling not dead but less cost-effective; Chinese open models fill US vacuum; AGI via co-evolution.
views.zh: 2025→2026年：预训练Scaling未死但性价比降低；中国开源模型填补美国空白；AGI通过共同进化实现。

views.en: Open models drive next decade of AI research; US-China gap may widen; distillation is gray area.
views.zh: 2026年：开源模型驱动未来十年AI研究；中美差距可能扩大；蒸馏是灰色地带。

people.tiZh: Scale AI 创始人 · Meta 超智能
people.bioEn: Founder and former CEO of Scale AI, which built much of the data infrastructure behind modern AI. In 2025 he joined Meta to lead its Superintelligence Labs.
people.bioZh: Scale AI 创始人兼前 CEO——它构建了现代 AI 背后的大量数据基础设施。2025 年加入 Meta,领导其超级智能实验室。

Alex Wang on Neuralink, AI, and the Future of Humanity
From Squiggle to Scale: Alex's Founder Journey
Alexander Wang on Data as the New Code and the Future of AI
Scale AI CEO Alexander Wang on Raising $100M at 22

views.en: Data is the key bottleneck for AI; AGI is far off; self-driving cars will be legal without steering wheels in under 10 years.
views.zh: 2019年：数据是AI的关键瓶颈；AGI还很遥远；无人驾驶汽车将在10年内实现无方向盘合法上路。

views.en: Data is the new code, not oil; post-training data is the limiting factor; AI will be the greatest economic engine.
views.zh: 2023年：数据是新代码而非石油；后训练数据是限制因素；AI将成为最伟大的经济引擎。

views.en: Post-training with specialized data is key; synthetic data works but not a silver bullet; no research gap between US and China.
views.zh: 2024年：专用数据的后训练是关键；合成数据有效但非万能；中美之间无研究差距。

views.en: AI is centralizing; data poisoning is a near-term threat; brain-computer interfaces needed for human relevance.
views.zh: 2025年：AI是中心化技术；数据投毒是近期威胁；脑机接口对人类保持相关性至关重要。

views.en: Recursive self-improvement is new paradigm; agents finally working; scaling laws continue; superintelligence coming soon.
views.zh: 2026年：递归自我改进是新范式；智能体终于可用；缩放定律持续；超级智能即将到来。

people.tiZh: Claude Code 创造者 · Anthropic
people.bioEn: Creator and lead of Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic command-line coding tool, and a central figure in the shift to AI-driven software engineering.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 智能体命令行编程工具 Claude Code 的创造者与负责人;AI 驱动软件工程浪潮中的核心人物。

views.en: Build for the model 6 months from now, not today's model; bet on general models.
views.zh: 为六个月后的模型构建，而非今天的模型；押注通用模型。

views.en: Coding is virtually solved; software engineer role evolves into 'builder' for everyone.
views.zh: 编码已基本解决；软件工程师角色演变为人人可做的“构建者”。

views.en: Safety is studied by releasing early; real-world behavior reveals more than internal evals.
views.zh: 通过早期发布来研究安全；真实世界行为比内部评估揭示更多。

views.en: Claude Code was an accident; organic growth from internal tool to agent platform.
views.zh: Claude Code 是个意外；从内部工具有机成长为智能体平台。

views.en: Loops are the next abstraction after agents; dynamic workflows orchestrate sub-agents.
views.zh: 循环是智能体之后的下一个抽象；动态工作流编排子智能体。

people.tiZh: Claude Code 产品 · Anthropic
people.bioEn: A product manager on Claude Code at Anthropic, shaping how developers work with agentic coding tools and how the team ships so fast.
people.bioZh: Anthropic Claude Code 团队产品经理,塑造开发者与智能体编程工具协作的方式,以及团队的高速迭代。

episodes.tEn: The New PM Playbook for AI-Native Products

people.tiZh: Claude Code 与 Cowork 负责人 · Anthropic
people.bioEn: Manager of the Claude Code and Cowork teams at Anthropic, overseeing engineering and product (including Boris Cherny and Cat Wu). A 25-year engineer who earlier built TypeScript and Visual Studio at Microsoft and started Facebook Marketplace at Meta.
people.bioZh: Anthropic Claude Code 与 Cowork 团队负责人,统管工程与产品(含鲍里斯·切尔尼、凯特·吴)。25 年工龄的工程师,早年在微软打造 TypeScript 与 Visual Studio,在 Meta 创立 Facebook Marketplace。

episodes.tEn: Fiona Fung on AI's Impact on Software Engineering
From Microsoft to Meta: Leadership Lessons in Speed, War Rooms, and Trust

views.en: Leadership: one-on-ones for live conversation, not status; dogfooding builds empathy; kindness is strategic; culture evolves.
views.zh: 领导力：一对一用于实时对话而非状态更新；亲自使用产品建立同理心；友善是战略工具；文化会演变。

views.en: Coding bottleneck removed; high agency & accountability key; verification critical; flow state lost; role boundaries blur.
views.zh: 编码瓶颈已消除；高主动性与责任感是关键；验证变得重要；心流状态消失；角色边界模糊。

views.en: Dogfooding and staying hands-on are essential for leaders to maintain product pulse and team rapport.
views.zh: 始终认为亲自使用产品并保持动手能力对领导者维持产品脉搏和团队默契至关重要。

views.en: Speed and mission alignment are core cultural drivers; adapt culture but stay true to passion.
views.zh: 始终强调速度和使命对齐是核心文化驱动力；文化可演变但需忠于热情。

views.en: From mentoring as mirror/adviser to advocating apprenticeship models for next-gen engineers in AI era.
views.zh: 从导师作为镜子/顾问，到在AI时代倡导学徒制培养下一代工程师。

people.tiEn: VP of Research & Gemini Co-lead · Google DeepMind
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁 · Gemini 共同负责人
people.bioEn: VP of Research at Google DeepMind and a co-lead of Gemini. Pioneered sequence-to-sequence learning and AlphaStar (StarCraft II), and contributed to AlphaFold — a central architect of frontier models and agents.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究副总裁、Gemini 共同负责人。序列到序列学习的开创者、AlphaStar(星际争霸 II)主导者,亦参与 AlphaFold——前沿模型与智能体的核心架构师。

episodes.tEn: Oriol Vinyals on World Models, Multimodal AI, and the Path to AGI
From Starcraft to Gemini: The Evolution of AI Agents

views.en: Scaling pre-training shows diminishing returns; algorithmic innovation and inference-time compute are new axes for progress.
views.zh: 2024年指出预训练Scaling收益递减，算法创新和推理时算力成为新增长轴。

views.en: Post-training RL for language lacks clean rewards, unlike games, making alignment harder but still crucial.
views.zh: 2024年强调语言后训练RL缺乏游戏中的清晰奖励信号，对齐更困难但依然关键。

views.en: Superintelligence may first emerge in narrow scientific domains, not through general models alone.
views.zh: 2024年预测超级智能可能先在科学窄域出现，而非仅靠通用模型。

views.en: World models jointly modeling language, vision, and video are a core path to AGI; video's GPT moment hasn't arrived.
views.zh: 2026年认为联合建模语言、视觉和视频的世界模型是通向AGI的核心路径，视频的GPT时刻尚未到来。

views.en: Memory for agents will be solved via non-parametric file-system style storage, not weight updates.
views.zh: 2026年提出智能体记忆将通过非参数化文件系统式存储解决，而非权重更新。

people.tiZh: Isomorphic Labs 首席 AI 官
people.bioEn: Chief AI Officer at Isomorphic Labs, applying AI to drug discovery. Earlier at DeepMind he led reinforcement-learning breakthroughs — Capture the Flag, population-based training and AlphaStar.
people.bioZh: Isomorphic Labs 首席 AI 官,用 AI 攻坚药物发现。早年在 DeepMind 主导强化学习突破——夺旗(Capture the Flag)、群体训练(PBT)与 AlphaStar。

episodes.tEn: Building a General AI Drug Design Engine: From AlphaFold 3 to Superhuman Creativity

people.tiEn: Principal Scientist · Google DeepMind; Professor, Imperial College
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 首席科学家 · 帝国理工教授
people.bioEn: Principal Scientist at Google DeepMind and Professor of Cognitive Robotics at Imperial College London. Works on AI reasoning, embodiment and the philosophy of mind; scientific advisor on the film Ex Machina.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 首席科学家、帝国理工学院认知机器人学教授。研究 AI 推理、具身与心智哲学;电影《机械姬》(Ex Machina)的科学顾问。

episodes.tEn: AI, Consciousness, and the Future of Mind

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家
people.bioEn: Research scientist at Google DeepMind and a co-lead of Genie, the line of general-purpose world models that generate interactive, playable environments. Works on open-endedness and reinforcement learning.
people.bioZh: Google DeepMind 研究科学家,通用世界模型 Genie 的共同负责人——可即时生成可交互、可游玩的环境。专注开放式学习与强化学习。

episodes.tEn: Genie 3: A 100x Leap in World Models

people.tiEn: Chief Scientist, Together AI; Professor, Princeton
people.tiZh: Together AI 首席科学家 · 普林斯顿教授
people.bioEn: Creator of FlashAttention and co-inventor of Mamba (state-space models). Chief Scientist at Together AI and a professor at Princeton, focused on efficient architectures and hardware-aware algorithms.
people.bioZh: FlashAttention 作者、Mamba(状态空间模型)共同发明人。Together AI 首席科学家、普林斯顿大学教授,专注高效架构与硬件感知算法。

episodes.tEn: The Future of AI Hardware and Architecture with Tri Dao

people.tiZh: CMU 助理教授 · Cartesia 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-inventor of structured state-space models (S4) and Mamba, a leading alternative to the Transformer for long-sequence modeling. Assistant professor at CMU and co-founder of Cartesia.
people.bioZh: 结构化状态空间模型(S4)与 Mamba 的共同发明人——长序列建模中 Transformer 的主要替代路线。CMU 助理教授、Cartesia 联合创始人。

episodes.tEn: Efficiently Modeling Long Sequences with Structured State Spaces

people.tiZh: OpenAI 研究员(前微软研究院)
people.bioEn: Led the team behind the phi small-language-model series and co-authored Sparks of AGI, an influential early study of GPT-4. Now at OpenAI, previously a VP at Microsoft Research.
people.bioZh: phi 小模型系列的主导者,《Sparks of AGI》(对 GPT-4 的早期深度研究)合著者。现就职 OpenAI,曾任微软研究院副总裁。

episodes.tEn: Sparks of AGI: Early Experiments with GPT-4

people.tiZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼首席科学家
people.bioEn: Co-founder and Chief Scientist of Mistral AI. Previously at Meta, where he led the original LLaMA models that catalysed the open-weight LLM movement.
people.bioZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼首席科学家。曾在 Meta 主导初代 LLaMA 模型,点燃了开放权重大模型浪潮。

episodes.tEn: Mistral Releases Boxtral TTS: Efficient Speech Generation with Novel Architecture

people.tiZh: OpenAI 首席研究官
people.bioEn: Chief Research Officer at OpenAI. Led work on DALL·E, Codex and the o-series reasoning models, and is a central figure in setting OpenAI research direction.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 首席研究官。主导 DALL·E、Codex 与 o 系列推理模型,是 OpenAI 研究方向的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: AI in Mathematics: From Ineffective Grad Student to Gold Medal Performance
The AI Talent War: Soup Diplomacy and Recruiting Strategies

views.en: Pre-training scaling laws are not dead; more compute goes to exploration than final training.
views.zh: 2025年：预训练的缩放定律并未失效；更多算力用于探索而非最终训练。

views.en: Alignment challenges like model scheming will be key in 1-2 years as models become more capable.
views.zh: 2025年：随着模型能力增强，模型欺骗等对齐挑战将在未来1-2年内成为关键。

views.en: AI can solve open math problems with minimal supervision; verification is the key bottleneck.
views.zh: 2026年：AI能在极少监督下解决开放数学问题；验证是关键瓶颈。

views.en: Human-AI collaboration remains essential; AI often gives up on hard problems like humans.
views.zh: 2026年：人机协作仍然至关重要；AI常像人类一样在难题上放弃。

views.en: OpenAI is a pure AGI research company; talent density and mission belief are critical.
views.zh: 始终：OpenAI是纯粹的AGI研究公司；人才密度和使命信念至关重要。

people.tiEn: Co-founder & Chief Science Officer, Hugging Face
people.tiZh: Hugging Face 联合创始人兼首席科学官
people.bioEn: Co-founder and Chief Science Officer of Hugging Face, the hub of the open-source AI ecosystem. A driving force behind the Transformers library and open model research.
people.bioZh: Hugging Face 联合创始人兼首席科学官——开源 AI 生态的中枢。Transformers 库与开放模型研究背后的核心推动者。

episodes.tEn: HuggingFace's Leap into Robotics: Building an Open Source Community for Physical AI

people.tiZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CEO(前 DeepMind)
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Reflection AI, building autonomous coding agents toward superintelligence. Previously a research scientist at Google DeepMind working on RL and Gemini.
people.bioZh: Reflection AI 联合创始人兼 CEO,打造迈向超级智能的自主编程智能体。曾任 Google DeepMind 研究科学家,从事强化学习与 Gemini。

episodes.tEn: Building Organizational Superintelligence: Misha on Reflection AI's Vision

people.tiZh: 斯坦福副教授 · 基础模型研究中心主任
people.bioEn: Associate professor at Stanford and director of the Center for Research on Foundation Models (CRFM). Known for HELM benchmarking, rigorous evaluation, and work on the science and transparency of foundation models.
people.bioZh: 斯坦福大学副教授、基础模型研究中心(CRFM)主任。以 HELM 评测体系、严谨的模型评估,以及基础模型的科学性与透明度研究著称。

episodes.tEn: Percy Liang on Foundation Models, Shared Reality, and the Evolution of NLP

people.tiEn: Director, Google DeepMind; Nobel Laureate in Chemistry
people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 总监 · 诺贝尔化学奖得主
people.bioEn: Led AlphaFold, the AI system that solved protein-structure prediction, earning the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry. A director at Google DeepMind applying deep learning to the foundations of biology.
people.bioZh: AlphaFold 的主导者——攻克蛋白质结构预测的 AI 系统,获 2024 年诺贝尔化学奖。Google DeepMind 总监,用深度学习改写生物学根基。

episodes.tEn: AlphaFold: AI's Nobel-Winning Leap in Protein Folding
AlphaFold: From Grand Challenge to Nobel Prize
AlphaFold, Nobel Prize, and the Future of AI in Biology

views.en: AlphaFold's success came from research innovation, not just data and compute; specialized architecture was key, not scaling.
views.zh: 2025年强调AlphaFold的成功源于研究创新而非单纯数据和算力，专用架构是关键，而非Scaling。

views.en: Confidence metrics are crucial for building trust in AI predictions; interpretability is not necessary for useful AI in science.
views.zh: 2025至2026年持续强调置信度指标对建立信任至关重要，而可解释性对科学AI并非必需。

views.en: AlphaFold 2 is the opposite of the bitter lesson; specialized architecture and many mid-size wins mattered more than scaling.
views.zh: 2026年明确AlphaFold 2是苦涩教训的反例：专用架构和多项中等改进比Scaling更重要。

views.en: AI tools like AlphaFold narrow hypothesis space and accelerate experiments, but do not replace human understanding.
views.zh: 始终认为AlphaFold等AI工具缩小假设空间、加速实验，但不会取代人类的理解。

people.tiEn: Professor, UC Berkeley; pioneer of computer vision
people.tiZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授 · 计算机视觉奠基人
people.bioEn: One of the founding figures of modern computer vision, a professor at UC Berkeley whose work spans perception, segmentation and sensorimotor learning. Mentor to a generation of vision and robotics researchers.
people.bioZh: 现代计算机视觉的奠基人之一,加州大学伯克利分校教授,研究横跨感知、分割与感觉运动学习,培养了一代视觉与机器人研究者。

episodes.tEn: Berkeley Professor Jitendra Malik on AI's Limits vs Human Intelligence

people.tiEn: Professor, UC Berkeley; foundations of machine learning
people.tiZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授 · 机器学习理论奠基人
people.bioEn: One of the most influential researchers in machine learning and statistics, a professor at UC Berkeley. Shaped graphical models, variational inference and the view of intelligence as a collective, economic system.
people.bioZh: 机器学习与统计学最具影响力的研究者之一,加州大学伯克利分校教授。奠定图模型、变分推断,并提出「智能是一种集体性、经济性系统」的视角。

episodes.tEn: AI Hype Hurts Young Innovators

people.tiEn: Co-founder & CTO, Sakana AI; Transformer co-author
people.tiZh: Sakana AI 联合创始人兼 CTO · Transformer 共同作者
people.bioEn: A co-author of the original Transformer paper (Attention Is All You Need). Co-founder and CTO of Sakana AI, exploring nature-inspired methods like model merging and continuous thought machines.
people.bioZh: Transformer 原始论文(《Attention Is All You Need》)的共同作者。Sakana AI 联合创始人兼 CTO,探索模型融合、连续思维机器等受自然启发的方法。

episodes.tEn: From Transformer Inventor to Continuous Thought Machine: A New Path in AI

people.tiEn: Professor, Stanford (prev. NVIDIA, AI2); commonsense reasoning
people.tiZh: 斯坦福大学教授(前 NVIDIA、AI2)· 常识推理
people.bioEn: A MacArthur Fellow and professor at Stanford known for advancing commonsense reasoning, language generation and the social and moral understanding of AI. Previously a senior director at NVIDIA and AI2.
people.bioZh: 麦克阿瑟天才奖得主、斯坦福大学教授,以推进常识推理、语言生成,以及 AI 的社会与道德理解著称。曾任 NVIDIA 与 AI2 高级总监。

episodes.tEn: Democratizing AI: The Case for Small Language Models
AI's Data Hunger: From Internet to Synthetic Data and the Quest for True Knowledge
Yejin Choi on Large Language Models: Progress, Limitations, and the Quest for Intelligence

views.en: Scaling alone may not solve common sense; smaller models with better data can outperform larger ones.
views.zh: 2023年指出，仅靠Scaling可能无法解决常识问题；更小模型配合更优数据可在特定任务上超越大模型。

views.en: Data is the fundamental bottleneck; AI must go beyond human knowledge to discover new truths.
views.zh: 2025年强调数据是根本瓶颈，AI需超越人类知识去发现新真理。

views.en: Small models with diverse synthetic data and RL during pre-training can rival frontier models.
views.zh: 2026年主张，小模型通过多样化合成数据和预训练阶段的强化学习可媲美前沿模型。

views.en: Pluralistic alignment and open research are crucial for safe, democratic AI.
views.zh: 始终认为多元对齐和开放研究对安全、民主的AI至关重要。

views.en: Post-training data diversity and quality matter more than scale for model capability.
views.zh: 始终认为后训练数据的多样性和质量比规模更能决定模型能力。

people.tiEn: VP & Distinguished Scientist, Microsoft AI (prev. DeepMind)
people.tiZh: 微软 AI 副总裁兼杰出科学家(前 DeepMind)
people.bioEn: A leading deep-learning researcher who led the Gato generalist agent and many multimodal efforts at DeepMind. Now a VP at Microsoft AI, and long known for his influential teaching on machine learning.
people.bioZh: 顶尖深度学习研究者,在 DeepMind 主导通用智能体 Gato 及大量多模态工作。现任微软 AI 副总裁;以其影响深远的机器学习公开课闻名。

episodes.tEn: AI in Africa: Leapfrogging Challenges and Exceeding Expectations
Nando de Freitas on AI as a Tool for All Humanity

views.en: AI should augment humans, like microscopes; generalist agents tokenizing all inputs are a step toward AGI.
views.zh: 2023年：AI应像显微镜一样增强人类；将一切输入token化的通用智能体是迈向AGI的一步。

views.en: Africa can leapfrog in AI; safety is the biggest open challenge; human skills matter as much as coding.
views.zh: 2026年：非洲可在AI领域实现跨越；安全是最大的开放挑战；人际技能与编程同等重要。

views.en: AI as a tool for all humanity, with diversity and inclusion essential for beneficial technology.
views.zh: 始终：AI应作为全人类的工具，多样性和包容性对构建有益技术至关重要。

people.tiEn: Director, Center for AI Safety; advisor to xAI
people.tiZh: AI 安全中心主任 · xAI 顾问
people.bioEn: Director of the Center for AI Safety and an advisor to xAI. Created widely used benchmarks (MMLU, MATH) and the GELU activation, and is a leading voice on catastrophic AI risk.
people.bioZh: AI 安全中心(CAIS)主任、xAI 顾问。提出广泛使用的评测基准(MMLU、MATH)与 GELU 激活函数,是灾难性 AI 风险议题的核心声音。

episodes.tEn: Super Intelligence Strategy: Beyond Humanity's Last Exam

people.tiZh: fast.ai 与 Answer.AI 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder of fast.ai, whose free courses trained a generation of deep-learning practitioners, and of Answer.AI. Co-created ULMFiT, a key precursor to modern transfer learning in NLP.
people.bioZh: fast.ai 联合创始人——其免费课程培养了一代深度学习从业者;亦创办 Answer.AI。共同提出 ULMFiT,是现代 NLP 迁移学习的关键先驱。

episodes.tEn: Jeremy Howard: The Art of Understanding AI

people.tiZh: Anthropic 联合创始人 · 可解释性先驱
people.bioEn: A co-founder of Anthropic who leads its interpretability research. Pioneered the mechanistic interpretability of neural networks — circuits, features and the effort to reverse-engineer what models actually compute.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人,领导其可解释性研究。开创了神经网络的机制可解释性——电路、特征,以及「逆向工程」模型内部到底在计算什么。

episodes.tEn: Chris Olah on Neural Network Interpretability and AI Safety

people.tiZh: Google DeepMind 机制可解释性负责人
people.bioEn: Leads the mechanistic interpretability team at Google DeepMind. A prominent educator on understanding the internals of language models, known for open tutorials, the TransformerLens library and superposition research.
people.bioZh: 领导 Google DeepMind 的机制可解释性团队。在「理解大模型内部」上影响广泛,以公开教程、TransformerLens 库与叠加(superposition)研究著称。

episodes.tEn: Maximizing Luck Surface Area: Neil Nando on Building a Career in AI

people.tiZh: Physical Intelligence 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Physical Intelligence, building a general-purpose AI brain for robots. Previously a research scientist at Google, where he worked on robot learning, RT-2 and SayCan.
people.bioZh: Physical Intelligence 联合创始人兼 CEO,为机器人打造通用的「AI 大脑」。曾任 Google 研究科学家,参与机器人学习、RT-2 与 SayCan。

episodes.tEn: Building Physical Intelligence: From Disappointment to Breakthrough

people.tiZh: Physical Intelligence 研究科学家(前 DeepMind)
people.bioEn: A research scientist at Physical Intelligence working on robot foundation models. Previously at DeepMind, with influential work on reinforcement learning (MPO), the all-convolutional network and guided backpropagation.
people.bioZh: Physical Intelligence 研究科学家,从事机器人基础模型。曾在 DeepMind,在强化学习(MPO)、全卷积网络与引导式反向传播等方向有重要工作。

episodes.tEn: Building Foundation Models for Robotics with Physical Intelligence

people.tiEn: Assistant Professor, CMU; Co-founder, Skild AI
people.tiZh: CMU 助理教授 · Skild AI 联合创始人
people.bioEn: Assistant professor at CMU and co-founder of Skild AI, building a general-purpose robot brain. Known for curiosity-driven exploration, self-supervised learning and rapid robot adaptation in the real world.
people.bioZh: CMU 助理教授、Skild AI 联合创始人,打造通用机器人大脑。以好奇心驱动探索、自监督学习,以及机器人在真实世界的快速适应著称。

episodes.tEn: Bridging the Generalization Gap in Machine Learning and Robotics
